creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
Add UNHANDLED_HACK "hack" from ports/131643 which was subsequently tested in
ports/132098 as a part of the Nagios 3.1.0 update.

PORTREVISION intentionally not bumped as option is obscure and off by default.

Fix: Downloadable diff from:
http://www.netleader.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/net-mgmt-nagios-UNHANDLED_HACK.diff
